package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for transport_metrics_emitted_from_repository_layer: Repositories that record HTTP-route or handler-oriented metrics.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule211NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule211NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule211NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario211Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule211NegativeService, input Rule211NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
